question: According to Romans, what does Paul say about God’s love demonstrated in relation to Christ’s death?

choices.A: While we were still sinners, Christ died for us
choices.B: After we became perfect, Christ died for us
choices.C: Christ died only for the righteous

teaching.title: God’s love shown in Christ’s death
teaching.body: Paul states that God shows his love in that Christ died for us while we were still sinners.
